test_cases.title: Password reset email is sent to the registered address
steps: Navigate to the Forgot Password page
test_cases.expected_result: A password reset email is delivered to the provided address containing a reset link

test_cases.title: Password reset link is rejected after 60 minutes
preconditions: A password reset link has been issued
steps: Wait until the link is older than 60 minutes
test_cases.expected_result: The link is rejected and an expiry message is shown to the user

test_cases.title: Old password no longer works after a successful reset
preconditions: A user has completed a password reset
steps: Attempt to log in using the previous password
test_cases.expected_result: Login with the old password fails; the old password has been invalidated

notes: Covers reset email delivery, 60-minute expiry, and old-password invalidation. The single-use link constraint and confirmation of the new password being accepted were not explicitly tested due to scope prioritisation.
